notableEvents.label: Dylan Moore pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dylan Moore lines out sharply to center fielder Michael Harris II.

notableEvents.label: Drake Baldwin GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Drake Baldwin grounds into a double play, second baseman Edmundo Sosa to shortstop Trea Turner to first baseman Bryce Harper. Michael Harris II out at 2nd. Drake Baldwin out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Eli White pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Eli White singles on a line drive to left fielder Otto Kemp. Matt Olson to 3rd.
